summary: Iteration 232 — S2.5 Modello Soggetti & Ruoli Testing Complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including Settings Sicurezza tab with Figure Aziendali form, SchedaCantierePage with 3 categories of soggetti (14 total roles), and pre-fill chain from company settings to cantiere.

issues: Minor: Console warning about 'value prop on input should not be null' - should use empty string instead

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: session token BccyJvnOyrPXRRYy4GfxR5osuF51RWcYWWnUUoHx434, user_id user_6988e9b9316c. Created test cantieri during testing which were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: S2.5 Modello Soggetti & Ruoli fully working. Key features verified: (1) PUT /api/company/settings saves figure_aziendali array correctly (critical bug fix confirmed), (2) GET /api/company/settings returns persisted figure_aziendali, (3) POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza creates cantiere with pre-filled soggetti from company figure_aziendali, (4) PUT /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id} updates soggetti correctly, (5) GET /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id} returns soggetti with all 14 roles, (6) GET /api/ruoli-disponibili returns all 14 available roles. Frontend: Settings page has 'Sicurezza' tab with FigureAziendaliTab component showing 5 company roles (DATORE_LAVORO, RSPP, MEDICO_COMPETENTE, PREPOSTO_CANTIERE, DIRETTORE_TECNICO). SchedaCantierePage shows 'Soggetti & Referenti' section with 3 categories: Figure Aziendali (5), Figure Committente/Cantiere (6), Figure Tecniche (3). Pre-fill chain works: company_settings.figure_aziendali → cantiere.soggetti with 'precompilato' status badge.

bug_fix_verified.issue: PUT /api/company/settings was not saving figure_aziendali array
bug_fix_verified.root_cause: 1) Duplicate figure_aziendali field in CompanySettings model, 2) Missing figure_aziendali in CompanySettingsUpdate model, 3) Missing explicit handling for figure_aziendali in PUT route
bug_fix_verified.fix_applied: 1) Removed duplicate field, 2) Added figure_aziendali to CompanySettingsUpdate, 3) Added explicit handling in PUT route (lines 61-62)
